description_long: This is a modern, geometric shelving unit featuring a black metal frame with four horizontal shelves. Each shelf is constructed from a dark wood or wood-like material and has rounded ends that extend beyond the frame, creating a visually striking silhouette. The shelves are staggered in a zigzag pattern, providing both open and semi-enclosed spaces for storage or display. The frame is rectangular and open, with no backing or side panels, allowing visibility and access from multiple angles. The design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as lofts, offices, or public spaces. The structure appears sturdy and is likely intended for freestanding placement against a wall or as a room divider.
description: A modern, open-frame shelving unit with four staggered, dark wood shelves and a black metal rectangular frame. The shelves have rounded ends and a geometric, zigzag arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the shelving unit, with all four shelves and their staggered, rounded design clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the unit and the depth of the shelves, with the rounded ends extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, mirroring the main face and showing the open structure and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the protruding rounded shelf ends.
